---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  The Corral (Work and Travel), Prep Cook, June 2025-September 2025

## Internships

1.  SAMPA Automative, Production Planning Intern, January 2026- February 2026

# Competencies

SAP, MS Office, AutoCAD,Python, Canva

# Hobbies

Pottery, Tennis, Trekking\
\
You can download my CV from the link below:\
\
[Download my CV](AysenazOzyer-CV.pdf)
